original_image_tags: A scan of the reverse side of a document or folder, appearing as a blank, aged, off-white or yellowed piece of paper with a slightly textured surface. The paper has a visible horizontal fold line across the upper middle. At the top, the word "ENCLOSURE" is stamped upside down in purple ink. Below it, the file reference number "62-83894-208" is handwritten in large, bold red ink. The paper shows signs of age, with some minor discoloration, a few small dark spots or ink splatters near the bottom left corner, and two dark, circular punch holes near the bottom edge. Faint, illegible text or impressions are visible through the paper from the other side.

elements.description: One stamped word 'ENCLOSURE' (upside down). One handwritten alphanumeric sequence in red ink: '62-83894-208'. Two dark circular punched holes near the bottom edge. Faint bleed-through text visible from the reverse side. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, or charts are present.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the same specific quoted text ('ENCLOSURE', '62-83894-208'), the same number and type of visual elements (stamp, handwritten text, punch holes, bleed-through), and there are no contradictions.
